posts.author: murali603
posts.text: Q4 results: Losses widened further. image 1167×673 156 KB I am the only one to ask questions in the earnings call, which was concluded few minuites ago. In the earlier calls they were not given any oppurtunity for me but now there is no one to ask questions other than me. Call summary: 15 mins of opening remarks, 10-15 mins allocated to me and call concluded in 30 min. There is no interest from any body. FY27 they will not breakeven at EBITDA level, but FY28 could be possible . They onboarded some international clients, which boosted the global lounge transaction volumes grew 140% year-on-year…
